Steps: 1. Choose 'Shop' in main navigation \n 2. System navigates to /shop page
Expected Result: The '/shop' URL must be visible in the address bar with appropriate page content

Steps: 1. Click on 'Wishlist' in main navigation \n 2. System navigates to /wishlist page
Expected Result: The '/wishlist' URL must be visible in the address bar with appropriate page content

Preconditions: User is logged in as Customer
Steps: 1. Attempt reaching '/admin-dashboard' directly from address bar
Expected Result: The system must display an 'Unauthorized' message or redirect to customer dashboard
The user must stay logged in and on the /track-order page header

Scenario: Redirect to Login for Protected Pages
Steps: 1. Attempt reaching '/checkout' page directly from address bar
Expected Result: The system must redirect guest to the login or registration page

Steps: 1. Enter a non-existent URL (e.g., /abcd) in the address bar
Expected Result: The system must display a 404 Error page
The system must redirect user back to the login page

Steps: 1. Enter URL for a known product (e.g., /shop/product/123) directly
Expected Result: The system should navigate directly to the product detail page

Steps: 1. Navigate to 'Track Order' \n 2. Use breadcrumb to go back to Home
Expected Result: The system must navigate back correctly to the main page
